quality.rationale: 基于四动量守恒与参考系定义的典型散射运动学推导，逻辑链条清晰且可迁移至任意两体碰撞场景

origin.question: Problem 2.11. Consider the reaction $1 + 2 \\rightarrow 3 + 4$ . The lab frame is defined to be the one in which $\underline{\mathbf{P}}_2 = 0$ . The C.M. frame is defined to be the one in which $\underline{\mathbf{P}}_1^{\mathbf{C.M.}} + \underline{\mathbf{P}}_2^{\mathbf{C.M.}} = 0$ . Show that:\n(e) $\mathbf{v}_{\mathbf{C},\mathbf{M}.} = \mathbf{P}_1 / (\mathbf{E}_1 + \mathbf{m}_2)$ .
origin.solution:
(e) From (d), we have
$$
1 - \mathrm {v}_{\mathbf {C . M .}}^{2} = [ \mathrm {E}_{\mathrm {t o t a l}}^{\mathbf {C . M .}} / (\mathrm {E}_{1} + \mathrm {m}_{2}) ]^{2},
$$
thus
$$
\mathbf {v}_{\mathbf {C}. \mathbf {M}.} = \left[ \frac {\mathbf {E}_{1}^{2} - \mathbf {m}_{1}^{2}}{(\mathbf {E}_{1} + \mathbf {m}_{2})^{2}} \right]^{\frac {1}{2}} = \frac {\mathbf {P}_{1}}{\mathbf {E}_{1} + \mathbf {m}_{2}}.
$$
